description: Install and configure the Codex CLI in your workspace.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: base_config_toml
variables.description:
Complete base TOML configuration for Codex (without mcp_servers section).
When empty, the module generates a minimal default:

  preferred_auth_method = "apikey"
  # model_provider = "aigateway"           (sets the default profile, when enable_ai_gateway = true)
  # model_reasoning_effort = "<value>"    (sets the reasoning effort, when model_reasoning_effort is set)

  [projects."<workdir>"]                  (when workdir is set)
  trust_level = "trusted"

When non-empty, the value is written verbatim as the base of config.toml;
mcp and AI Gateway sections are still appended after it.
Note: model_reasoning_effort and workdir trust are only applied in the
default config. Include them in your custom config if needed.

variables.name: codex_version
variables.description: The version of Codex to install.

variables.name: icon
variables.description: The icon to use for the app.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: MCP server configurations in TOML format. When set, servers are appended to the Codex config.toml.

variables.name: model_reasoning_effort
variables.description: The reasoning effort for the model. One of: none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh. See https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/latest-model#lower-reasoning-effort

variables.name: openai_api_key
variables.description: OpenAI API key for Codex CLI.

variables.name: post_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after installing Codex.

variables.name: pre_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before installing Codex.

variables.name: workdir
variables.description: Optional project directory. When set, the module pre-creates it if missing and adds it as a trusted project in Codex config.toml.
